data.body: Epic A (sage-votary-logic) fully landed and merged to main as PR #22 (squash, 26 checks green): the v3 batch step + if: overlay constructs, the engine-side IR<->BPMN round-trip, the bpmn-js front-end editor (criteria add/remove/edit + agent<->batch toggle), and a module-size refactor (runners.py) keeping executor.py under the 800-LOC cap. All 4 A-stories + the epic are signed-closed by the completion verifier. Closing A unblocked epic B (peak-fir-hilt). Decomposed epic B into 6 dependency-wired stories: B1 knotty-hat-chase (production batch-runner from sizing.py behind A's BatchRunner seam) -> B2 unfed-posse-urn (plan-review as engine workflow); B3 core-farce-seed (completion-verifier as engine workflow, the walking skeleton); both B2+B3 -> B4 key-gun-morph (planned-trace parity harness) -> B5 pout-gloss-hoop (cut gates over, signing intact) -> B6 arid-stump-twin (remove throwaway samples). Starting B3 on branch feat/gate-workflow-migration.
